caption: A group of people perform martial arts on a blue carpeted stage inside a large hall with high ceilings and ornate chandeliers. In the foreground, a man dressed in a blue traditional martial arts uniform executes dynamic movements, transitioning from a low, wide stance into a high, leaping strike with one arm extended upward. Around him, other practitioners in white uniforms and one in red move through their own forms. In the background, an audience is seated, watching the performance. As the sequence progresses, the man in blue shifts his position and momentum, moving from a focused strike toward the right side of the stage. The lighting is bright and warm, illuminating the spacious venue. No on-screen text, logos, or specialized equipment are visible beyond the performance area and the attire of the practitioners.
